params._data: Data to emit. As much as gas allows to emit. Also known as unindexed event data.
params._topics: List of topics to emit. Can be 0 to 4 (incl.) entries. Also known as indexed event data.

params._msgHash: Hash of the message payload to call target with.

emitLog(bytes32[],bytes).notice: Emits an event log with the given number of topics and the given data.

validateMessage((address,uint256,uint256.notice: Validates a cross chain message using the CrossL2Inbox predeploy. This emits an executing message.

emitLog(bytes32[],bytes).notice: Emits an event log with the given number of topics and the given data.

validateMessage((address,uint256,uint256.notice: Validates a cross chain message using the CrossL2Inbox predeploy. This emits an executing message.

userdoc.notice: EventLogger is a util contract to emit log events, primarily for integration testing.

params._topics: List of topics to emit. Can be 0 to 4 (incl.) entries. Also known as indexed event data.

params._msgHash: Hash of the message payload to call target with.
